allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 20576 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \('\\''PID: '\\'' + $_.OwningProcess\); Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess')

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($c in $conns\) { Write-Output \("Killing PID " + $c.OwningProcess\); Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $left = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($left\) { Write-Output "Still listening:"; $left | Select-Object OwningProcess } else { Write-Output "Port 3000 free" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object OwningProcess; foreach \($c in $conns\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "Port 3000 free" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output "STILL BUSY" } else { Write-Output "OK port 3000 free" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($c in $conns\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output "STILL BUSY" } else { Write-Output "Port 3000 free" })

Bash(timeout 60 bash -c 'until grep -qE "Ready in|started server|Local:|Error|EADDRINUSE" "/c/Users/conta/AppData/Local/Temp/claude/c--Users-conta-OneDrive-Desktop-Cursor-Viji/22045efd-3449-48e1-abdc-ee8e52bdd861/tasks/bn7l85avf.output" 2>/dev/null; do sleep 1; done; echo "---DETECTED---"')

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess, @{N='Proc';E={\(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess\).ProcessName}})
